description:
SUBSCRIBE TO WATCH THE VIDEOS FIRST https://www.youtube.com/@govclose/?sub_confirmation=1 

GET CERTIFIED: Earn up to $400K a year as a freelance GOVERNMENT CONTRACT CONSULTANT: https://www.govclose.com/sales-certification 

Watch 2024 Sam.gov Registration
https://youtu.be/ahOJCDV4Q-E?si=e_fZxBuIrwkQaOtQ

Fred's website: https://www.gearsproductmarketing.com

Fred Carl is a top graduate of the GovClose certification program and owner of Gears PDM. Fred  shares his extensive experience in the outdoor and military gear market, detailing his journey and valuable insights. 

From his stint at Gerber Gear to his specialization in ergonomic niche design and consulting, Fred explains the intricacies of getting products like automatic knives to meet rigorous military standards and win military contracts for small business.

He also discusses the GovClose program's value in understanding the complex world of government procurement, emphasizing the importance of strategic planning, NSN processes, and the benefits of networking. 

The video further breaks down how Fred helps companies navigate federal contracts, saving them time and money by providing essential knowledge and expertise.

00:00 Introduction to Automatic Knives in Military Contracts
00:52 Fred Carl's Career Journey
02:04 Working with Gerber Gear
04:01 Insights from Field Observations
06:10 GovClose Certification Success Stories
07:31 Developing the E-Pet Effect Weapons Tool
08:56 Navigating the NSN Process
12:06 Choosing the GovClose Program
12:25 Consulting for Smaller Companies
22:05 Challenges in Government Contracting
25:00 Leveraging GovClose Network
31:46 Fred Carl's Expertise and Services
34:39 Conclusion and Contact Information
